required_validations: ci: required status checks must pass before merge
test: tests or recorded evidence for sensitive paths
process: PR title/body aligned with actual diff (intent match)
test: targeted regression for path prefixes with several recent commits overlapping this diff
top_risk_factors: Sensitive areas changed without test file changes in this diff
PR title/body keywords do not align with paths in the diff
Diff overlaps a path prefix touched in multiple recent commits
